window.notes: Synthetic illustration window for Lambda Lang CCP editing sessions; values are schematic and not empirically measured.

notes: Disk-backed narrative memory capturing Lambda Lang's long-run continuity, including PADCN affective traces and CCP discussions.
Full-injection architecture: lambda-memory.md is loaded in every session, so this example acts as a "no selective-loading" control for Birch analyses.
Because this is a schematic example, actual byte sizes and cycle counts should be replaced with real measurements when hosts adopt this pattern.
